name_cn:
ONTHEGO Small Bag #️⃣M46373
Exclusive global launch! This item features Italian custom craftsmanship, dynamic chip code changing, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest full gift box!

(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Removable zip coin pouch
Large zip interior pocket
Interior pocket
D-ring
Riveted corners
Strap: Removable, adjustable

Handles: Double handles
Made in Italy
